Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order To Charge Member'S Interest In A Limited Liability Company
Off Calendar Aug-14-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Robert H. Staley, Esq. of Epstein Englert Staley & Coffey, Tel. 415.398.6392, for Plaintiff and moving party;
No other appearance.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF UNION SQUARE BUILDING, LLC's Motion For Order To Charge Member'S Interest In A Limited Liability Company is Granted. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR # 5976

Notice Of Motion For Costs And Attorney'S Fees
Off Calendar Jun-07-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Plaintiff's Motion for attorney's fees and costs.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald J. Sullivan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Maria Viscio #12353
Robert Staley, Esq. for the plaintiff Union Square Building, LLC.
No oppostitions were made at the hearing.
After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court granted:
Attorneys' fees - $24,707.00
Costs - $2,207.60, for a Total of $26,914.60
Order was submitted to and signed by the Court.

MASTER CALENDAR SHORT CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-27-2011 Set For Trial On Apr-16-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Apr-16-2012 Assigned To Trial Court

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Apr-10-2012 Failure To Post Jury Fees

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Apr-17-2012 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Court Trial/Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Judge: Donald J. Sullivan, Clerk: S. Vantree, CSR: Sonai Wong #11288.

Robert Staley, Esq., special appearance for plaintiff Union Square Building, LLC..
WitnessStephen Brett sworn and testifies under oath.
No appearance by Defendant Simayof, Inc.
After hearing the testimony and considering the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against the Defendant as follows:

Damages - $159,308.00
Attorney's Fees - Plaintiff to recover its costs and reasonable attorney's fees.
Prejudgment Interest - $11,948.00
Total judgment in the amount of $171,256.00
Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Notice Of Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment
Off Calendar Dec-01-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Robert H. Staley, from Epstein, Englert, Staley & Coffey, 415-398-6392, for Plaintiff and moving party

No other Appearance. Tentative Ruling is adopted. PLAINTIFF UNION SQUARE BUILDING, LLC'S Notice Of Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment is Granted as to defendants Simayof, Inc. and SIMUS Inc. and denied as to Adi Simyaof and Dan Wiskind. The corporate defendants did not file an opposition. Paragraph 9 of the application is required to but does not specify the property to be attached against the individual defendants. (Weil & Brown (9:908-9), Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn, not reported.
